Defines display orientation, type, and dimensions for the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines several preprocessor macros related to display configurations and properties. It includes macros for different display orientations, such as `DISPLAY_ORIENTATION_COLUMN_MAJOR_INVERTED` and `DISPLAY_ORIENTATION_ROTATED_180`, which are used to specify the orientation of the display. The file also defines macros for display types, such as `PBL_BW` for black and white displays and `PBL_COLOR` for color displays, as well as `PBL_RECT` and `PBL_ROUND` for rectangular and round displays, respectively. Additionally, it specifies the display dimensions with `PBL_DISPLAY_WIDTH` and `PBL_DISPLAY_HEIGHT`, and calculates the total number of bytes in the display framebuffer with `DISPLAY_FRAMEBUFFER_BYTES`. The legacy display dimensions are also defined for compatibility with older systems.
